title: 3 Warren Buffett Stocks to Buy Hand Over Fist in December
text: Berkshire Hathaway holds positions in more than 40 stocks, many of which were picked by Warren Buffett himself. It's tough to make a case against most of Berkshire's stocks, as they are largely solid businesses and industry leaders.

title: NVR, INC. ANNOUNCES FOUNDER DWIGHT C. SCHAR AWARDED LIFETIME ACHIEVEMENT AWARD
